messages.body: Walk me through the orchid display from afternoon prep to the blackout.
In the afternoon the old accession card was clipped behind the binder ring. At night the packet looked cleaner, like someone had rebuilt it.
Who would have had reason to touch donor-facing provenance materials that late?
Daria. She kept saying the story had to stay polished for the sponsors.
I thought I had mixed something up, so I did not say anything right away.
